channel.title: Agency use cases for React + WordPress?
channel.description:
Hi guys,
I wonder if in an agency scenario, how can frontity help with cutting costs, improving maintenance and security, etc? I can understand that GitHub's CI/CD can be very helpful especially with React. And that [Storybook](https://storybook.js.org/) is useful for documenting and testing components.
Are there other scenarios where Frontity should be the go-to for agencies to use it?
PS I'm speaking in terms of increasing revenue for companies.
Thanks!
- Mike

item.title: Agency use cases for React + WordPress?
item.dc:creator: mikes
item.description:
Update: For those reading this.
I was able to scour the internet and come across a bunch of useful articles across the “Headless WordPress” or “decoupled WordPress” side of the internet and look into how react is being used with WordPress.

The About Frontity - Frontity Docs page has been very helpful too.

Read full topic
item.source: Agency use cases for React + WordPress?

item.title: Agency use cases for React + WordPress?
item.dc:creator: mikes
item.description:
Hi guys,

I wonder if in an agency scenario, how can frontity help with cutting costs, improving maintenance and security, etc? I can understand that GitHub’s CI/CD can be very helpful especially with React. And that Storybook is useful for documenting and testing components.

Are there other scenarios where Frontity should be the go-to for agencies to use it?

PS I’m speaking in terms of increasing revenue for companies.

Thanks!

  • Mike

Read full topic
item.source: Agency use cases for React + WordPress?
